title: Create With A Slight Twist
description: A create mod-focused mod pack with optimization mods and add-ons
body:
This mod pack is focused on create mod with add-ons and features that make it more fun and awesome!
Features:
- Optimization (many optimizations and QoL mods have been added)
- New structures
- New items
- New ores
- and many more...

All credits go to the awesome mod developers

> **This mod pack is under development**, if you have any suggestions, don't hesitate to tell me (`parham125` on discord)
